message:
fix: preserve raw_usage, web search raw data, and handle TurnSystem

Review findings:
- Usage.Raw was not preserved in metrics.extra.raw_usage (lossless gap)
- WebSearchData.Raw was not preserved in web_searches entries
- TurnSystem was silently dropped from ATIF output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
